variants.creative_direction: Ebony grand piano emerges from vast, dark stage depth. Ultra-wide low angle captures diffused rig lights dissolving into auditorium void. Atmospheric haze and crimson undertones invoke reverence and monumental scale.

flux_prompt.scene: Vast luminous void dissolving from deep black into diffused amber and crimson halos, atmospheric haze catching scattered light beams
flux_prompt.style: Hasselblad X2D 100C, 55mm f/2.8, long exposure color field
flux_prompt.lighting: Radial bloom of warm amber rig light dissolving into crimson penumbra, deep vignette edges fading to absolute black
flux_prompt.mood: reverential, monumental, epic, hushed, transcendent
flux_prompt.background: Deep black color field with soft radial crimson-amber luminance bloom, richly gradated for dark ebony instrument composite
flux_prompt.composition: Radial gradient centered low, light blooming upward into darkness, strong vignette framing with luminous core

camera.angle: Extreme low angle, near floor level, tilted slightly upward
camera.depth_of_field: Extremely shallow, foreground and edges dissolving into total bokeh, only central light bloom in soft focus

variants.creative_direction: Deep amber and smoldering gold bleed through smoke haze, evoking a late-night jazz club. The YS-100's gold lacquer catches warm candlelight, glowing against soft bokeh halos and dark, receding warmth.

flux_prompt.scene: Dissolving fields of amber, molten gold, and deep shadow — smoke-diffused light blooms floating in warm darkness
flux_prompt.style: Leica M11, Noctilux-M 50mm f/0.95 ASPH
flux_prompt.lighting: Scattered warm candlelight halations, soft gold gradients dissolving into deep brown-black shadow, no hard edges
flux_prompt.mood: intimate, smoky, soulful, late-night warmth, golden reverie
flux_prompt.background: Vertical gradient from deep crimson-black at base rising through smoked amber to diffused gold bloom at center
flux_prompt.composition: Radial bokeh bloom centered slightly high, warm light density fading outward into near-black vignette edges
